Lord Gimblox's Signet Ring  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: FINGER
SV FIRE: +4
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Lord Gimblox's Signet Ring
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: FINGER
SV FIRE: +4
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Espio
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:03
Page Updated:Sun Apr 23rd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 35
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)
NPC Name
Lord Gimblox

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Lake Rathetear
Quest Name
Cleric Epic: Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)

Lord Gimblox's Signet Ring item window 2017

▲ Page top
Cleric Epic Changes via 3-10 patch
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2021 at 9:34 AM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
- - - Only someone that has handed Blood Soaked Plasmatic Priest Robe to Omat will receive the Ornate Sea Shell II when handing Lord Gimblox's Signet Ring to Natasha.
- - - Once you hand the Lord Gimblox's Signet Ring to Natasha you will have to hand a new Blood Soaked Plasmatic Priest Robe to Omat for Natasha to accept another Signet Ring from you.
____________________________
Allakhazam Developer and Admin

For real time update information on Allakhazam, follow me on Twitter!
https://twitter.com/gidono

Or join us via our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/zu9tTS7
▲ Page top
cruel joke
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2006 at 10:05 PM Rating: Default
Trabik
184 posts
This is pretty crazy to have a line of clerics wanting the room, but one player (like me) holds the camp for 3 days pulling his hair out that the mob won't spawn. I don't play to baby sit mobs that can't even hit me for double digit dmg. Seems only fair to let more clerics have access to Lord Gimblox, so why not spawn him every 20min like it is possible to do, but once a cleric (or a MQ'r) gets the drop, then lock his toon for 3days. I would be happier with that, and play an alt, than to just sit here and pick my nose for 50+ hrs. Not much fun in that, especially when i know I am going to kill him with one nuke when he spawns. Missing guild flag runs, raids, and other fun stuff all for this insane concept. At least they did make the drop rate of pearl shards in SF more frequent, but that too use to be a few months worth of killing mobs you were no longer getting xp for.
▲ Page top
i got him
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2005 at 11:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592282281182
10 posts
wow was ready to spend the weekend camping this guy, and after only 3 hours there he is =) and guild mate had the rope collecting dust so now doing ixy tomarrow

loc
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2005 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256244922
30 posts
Loc -796.45 -366.62 confirmed. dood is a pain to spawn, plan on being here for a long time, or getting lucky, buy a lotto ticket the same day you start the camp chances are you'll win it b4 he spawns
▲ Page top
Location
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2004 at 3:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591816595236
1 post
Can anyone tell me the location of Grimblox? I am having a hard time finding his room.
▲ Page top
Gimblox
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2004 at 9:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758553670
17 posts
Hi there Clerics of Norrath.

I bound in Goblin King Room in Sol A. I pop in and out hoping to catch him. The gobbies were annoying and no match for my pet...laffs. As a 59 Cleric, can I solo this guy? Any stratagies? Suggestions? Appreciate your advise.
▲ Page top
Gimblox
QuoteReply
# May 31 2012 at 12:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971858449
2 posts
Yes you can i was playing with my dad and i was playing on his girlfriends cleric she was level 59 and we waited for 6 hours when he showed up. when i attacked him, i killed him as easy as a cave rat
▲ Page top
RE: Gimblox
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2004 at 1:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Clear the room around him, root and nuke. I had resists of 100+ or buffed to 100+ when I took him, and none of the goblins in the room's spells hit me at all. Easy to solo, you could even melee him with the summoned hammer, and your pet.

Anyway, I did it at lower level than you (51), making sure to pacify when breaking the room, and using root to handle adds. I was able to keep the king room and gimblox room clear solo (was boring camp). Only possible problem you could have is if you got adds, or were trained. I did have someone try to train me out of the camp, but luckily he died, and I was able to root and single kill the mobs he brought.
▲ Page top
yes
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2003 at 2:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777429057
3 posts
yes the crown can be mq because i did mq for myself. I camped it with 65alt because he had eb fishing pole. then made the turn in and just looted with me cleric. as far as the ring i understand that it is also mq able but i have not done so myself
▲ Page top
can pieces be mq?
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2003 at 10:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592790043299
7 posts
Can somebody tell me if anypart of the cleric epic is multiquestable? i never relized the the ring and the crown were part of the cleric epic if they can be mq i would just do it for a cleric
▲ Page top
RE: can pieces be mq?
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2003 at 8:37 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
The only piece I know for CERTAIN can be MQed, is the scroll from chardok.

Typically, however, any turn in that involves 2 or more pieces can be MQed, as long as the quester has at least one of the pieces, and turns their piece in last.

Edited, Tue Sep 9 09:35:44 2003
▲ Page top
Camp Time
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2003 at 11:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252195363
2 posts
I started camping this guy at the beginning of June. I just got him today. My total time camping him was just over 25 hours (non-consecutive).

The spawn time is almost exactly 19 minutes. There was no change in spawn time from the last placeholder I killed to when Lord Gimblox spawned.

At Level 54, my cleric held the room without any trouble, although getting there was interesting a couple times. ;)

Good luck to all you other clerics!

Starbow Vivify
Level 54 Cleric
The Rathe
▲ Page top
OMG
QuoteReply
# May 24 2003 at 11:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257828803
7 posts
Can u believe i got this ring when i was lvl 30 or so while camping the Goblin King room for xp...i didnt know what it was for so i later distroyed it thinknin it was just taking up space in my inventory..now that im near starting my epic and i begin to do some research on it..lo and behold this ring is part of it!!! OMG!!! i could just kill myself for this =/
